text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her debut race now before her, Vodka is burning
up the scene. But when she sees how laid back her
competitors are, she feels let down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On top of that, if she loses to one of them,
Vodka will think of herself as lame.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not wanting to make a half-hearted debut,
Vodka lifts her spirits and heads to the paddock.
